summary: Phase 4 (P4) testing completed successfully. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All P4 frontend features verified working: Authentication (login/register/logout), User Profiles (view/edit stats), Version History (save/restore), Visibility Toggle (public/private), and World Reviews (star ratings + comments).

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for all dialogs

passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@hytale.builder)
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: Register new user creates account and sets cookies
Backend: Register with duplicate email returns 400
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user when authenticated
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 when unauthenticated
Backend: Logout clears cookies and session
Backend: Token refresh endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/users/{id}/profile returns profile with stats
Backend: PUT /api/users/profile updates bio/name
Backend: Profile update requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/worlds/{id}/versions creates version snapshot
Backend: GET /api/worlds/{id}/versions lists versions
Backend: POST /api/worlds/{id}/versions/{vid}/restore restores world
Backend: PUT /api/worlds/{id}/visibility?is_public=true sets public
Backend: PUT /api/worlds/{id}/visibility?is_public=false sets private
Backend: Visibility toggle requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/reviews/{gallery_id} returns reviews
Backend: POST /api/reviews creates review (requires auth)
Backend: Review creation requires authentication
Backend: World CRUD operations still work
Backend: Templates endpoint returns 5 templates
Backend: Gallery endpoint returns entries
Frontend: Sign In button opens auth dialog
Frontend: Auth dialog has email/password fields
Frontend: Login flow sets cookies and shows user name in header
Frontend: Register link switches to Create Account mode with Name field
Frontend: Registration creates account and logs in user
Frontend: Profile button opens profile dialog with stats (Worlds, Published, Downloads, Likes)
Frontend: Profile dialog has edit form for Name and Bio
Frontend: Version History button visible when logged in and world loaded
Frontend: Version History dialog shows versions with Save/Restore buttons
Frontend: Visibility toggle button (lock/unlock) visible when logged in
Frontend: Gallery shows Review button on cards when logged in
Frontend: Review dialog has star rating selector and comment textarea
Frontend: Review dialog shows existing reviews with ratings
Frontend: Logout button clears session and shows Sign In button
critical_code_review_comments: All P4 features implemented correctly with proper authentication flow
httpOnly cookies used for secure token storage
Brute force protection implemented (5 attempts lockout)
Version history limited to 20 versions per world (good practice)
Reviews prevent duplicate submissions from same user
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on backend startup. Test users created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P4 features fully tested and working. Auth uses httpOnly cookies with axios withCredentials=true. Admin user auto-seeded. Gallery entries exist for review testing. Version history, visibility toggle, and reviews all functional. Minor console warnings about missing DialogContent descriptions (accessibility improvement opportunity).

authentication.register: Working - creates user, sets cookies, returns user data
authentication.login: Working - validates credentials, sets httpOnly cookies
authentication.me: Working - returns current user from cookie

user_profiles.get_profile: Working - returns stats (worlds_count, published_count, downloads, likes)

visibility.toggle: Working - sets is_public flag with auth

reviews.get_reviews: Working - returns reviews for gallery entry
reviews.duplicate_prevention: Working - prevents same user reviewing twice
